title: Discord Bridge
description: A plugin that bridges chat messages between Discord & Minecraft.
body:
# Discord Bridge

A somewhat cool plugin that creates a chat bridge between Discord & Minecraft.

---

> [Quick setup guide](https://github.com/Lukiiy/DiscordBridge/wiki/Setup)

| Command | Description | Permission |
|:---|:---:|---:|
| `discordbridge` | Main command, with many subcommands! | dcbridge.cmd |

## Discord features

| Command | Description | Roles |
|:---|:---:|---:|
| `console` | Executes a command as console | Console |

### Extra implemented stuff

**Spigot:** [PlaceholderAPI](https://placeholderapi.com/)  
**Paper:** [PlaceholderAPI](https://placeholderapi.com/), Advancements (built-in), [Folia](https://papermc.io/software/folia)

### For developers

Feel free to make your own addons. For an example, refer to [DCBridge-Advancements](https://github.com/Lukiiy/DCBridge-Advancements) or [BetaDeaths](https://github.com/Lukiiy/BetaDeaths).
You can use the **.jar** file as a dependency.
